channel.title: Machine Learning on Rafelia's AI LOLs
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Rafelia's AI LOLs

item.title: 🤖 MaAS: The AI Avengers or Just a Fancy Group Chat? 🦸‍♂️🤖
item.description: AI agents working together? Sounds great… until they start arguing. Enter MaAS, an AI teamwork system that’s either the future or a sci-fi disaster in the making!
